mapper.sql: id , article_id, user_id, parent_id, content, floor, like_count, reply_count, status, top, top_order, review_user_id, review_time, review_reason, ip_address, user_agent, mention_user_ids, report_count, comment_version, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.floor, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status as comment_status, c.top, c.mention_user_ids, c.top_order, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.deleted, a.title as article_title, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.gender, u.status as user_status, ru.id as replied_user_id, ru.nickname as replied_user_name, ru.avatar as replied_user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN article a ON c.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN comment pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON pc.user_id = ru.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.article_id = #{query.articleId} ORDER BY
top_order DESC, like_count DESC, create_time DESC
create_time DESC, top_order DESC
top_order DESC, like_count DESC, create_time DESC
LIMIT #{query.pageSize} OFFSET #{query.offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( article_id, parent_id, content, floor, user_id, like_count, reply_count, status, top, top_order, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{articleId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{floor}, #{userId}, #{likeCount}, #{replyCount}, #{status}, #{top}, #{topOrder}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE comment
content = #{content}, status = #{status}, top = #{top}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, review_user_id = #{reviewUserId}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, comment_version = comment_version + 1, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE comment SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT MAX(CAST(floor AS UNSIGNED)) as max_floor FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET reply_count = #{replyCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE comment SET status = #{status}, review_user_id = #{reviewUserId}, review_time = NOW(), review_reason = #{reviewReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE comment SET top = #{top}, top_order = #{topOrder}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.floor, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.top, c.mention_user_ids, c.top_order, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.deleted, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.gender, u.status FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM comment WHERE id IN
#{id}
AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0 AND top = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.floor, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status as comment_status, c.top, c.mention_user_ids, c.top_order, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.deleted, a.title as article_title, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.gender, u.status as user_status, ru.id as replied_user_id, ru.nickname as replied_user_name, ru.avatar as replied_user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN article a ON c.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN comment pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON pc.user_id = ru.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY
like_count DESC, create_time DESC
create_time DESC
like_count DESC, create_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
